name: Lima (Peru)

colors.symbolism: the field and the heraldic gold of the city arms

description: A yellow (gold) field bearing the coat of arms of Lima — three crowns and a star, granted to Lima by Charles V in 1537.
history: Lima, the 'City of Kings' (Ciudad de los Reyes), was founded in 1535 by Francisco Pizarro. The historic coat of arms was granted by Emperor Charles V in 1537.

features.role: Coat of arms of Lima (three crowns and star)
